Container.Name: GyroidVault
Container.Overview: GyroidVault is a modern, self-hosted 3D model library and print management platform. Organize your STL, 3MF, and Gcode files, track your print history, and manage your projects in a beautiful dashboard.
Container.Changes:
### v1.1.1 (2026-05-25) This is a quick maintenance update bringing several quality of life improvements to the Folder View and resolving some slicer integration bugs!
**What's new:** - **Folder View UI upgrades:** Added an item counter ("Showing X Folders / Y Files") at the top of the folder view. - **Folder View 3D Previews:** You can now click directly on a 3D model inside the folder view to launch an interactive 3D preview without needing to leave the page. - **Per-file Thumbnails:** Gcode and Image files now display their own unique thumbnail inside the Folder View, rather than all files inheriting the main model thumbnail. - **ARM64 Support:** The official Docker image now natively supports Raspberry Pi and Apple Silicon processors.
**Fixes:** - Fixed a bug where clicking "Open in Slicer" for Bambu Studio and OrcaSlicer would result in a download error or a blank page due to spaces in file paths.
### v1.1.0 (2026-05-23) This update brings a highly requested Folder View mode and fixes several annoying bugs under the hood.
**What's new:** - **Folder View:** You can now browse your library exactly as it exists on your disk. Enable this via System Settings.
**Fixes:** - **Persistent navigation:** Clicking the back button from a model page now correctly remembers your current page and active filters. - **Scanner performance:** Adjusted the background scanner so it no longer freezes the web UI when processing massive libraries (e.g. 2TB+). - Custom categories created in the settings now show up in menus immediately, without needing a container restart. - Fixed a small visual bug that sometimes caused the 'Open in Slicer' dropdown menu to disappear when hovering over it.
Container.Description: Self-hosted 3D model library and print management platform.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: The port for the GyroidVault web interface.

Config.Name: 3D Models Library
Config.Description: Path to your 3D models and prints library.

Config.Name: Library Path (Internal)
Config.Description: Internal container path for the library. Must match the 3D Models Library Target path.
